html: Before you run and go purchase a unified memory computer (e.g., DGX Spark, Mac, Ryzen AI Max 395 / Strix Halo), be aware dense models generally run slow on these machines. Dedicated GPUs run dense models significantly better. Look for benchmarks for your prospective machine. If you really want one of these, you'll be better off running Qwen 3.6 35B or another sparse MoE model.
